sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي أَحْمَدُ سَاعَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed svakodnevno provodi mnogo sati na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed spends many hours on social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُحِبُّ مُشَارَكَةَ الصُّوَرِ الْجَمِيلَةِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ وَعَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: On voli dijeliti lijepe fotografije sa svojim prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: He likes sharing beautiful photos with his friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهِ فِي مَجْمُوعَاتٍ خَاصَّةٍ لِتَبَادُلِ الْأَفْكَارِ.
sentences.translation: Također razgovara sa svojim kolegama u privatnim grupama radi razmjene ideja.
sentences.translationEn: He also talks with his colleagues in private groups to exchange ideas.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتْ هَذِهِ التَّطْبِيقَاتُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِهِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove aplikacije postale su osnovni dio njegovog svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: These applications have become an essential part of his daily life.
